title: Fix guard-hook suite fixture (whole-dir lib vendoring) and rejoin verify
action: Per diagnosis (decision 39be1227): hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs is CORRECT; the suite skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs fails 9/21 only because its fixture's hand-maintained VENDORED_LIB_MODULES (L67-78) lists 10 lib modules while the hook's dynamic import graph rooted at state.mjs needs 17 (missing: lock, decisions, dispatch-guard, judge, schedule, worktree-holds, worktree-store) — the import throws, the outer fail-open catch returns 0, every deny row regresses to allow. Fix TEST-SIDE, durable form: replace the hand list with a whole-directory copy of templates/lib/*.mjs into the fixture's .bee/bin/lib/ (the list went stale at least twice before — kill the class, not the instance), keeping the throwingRegistry command-registry.mjs override on top. Then remove the EXCLUDE entry + its misdiagnosing comment in scripts/run_verify.mjs (~L51-61) so discovery adopts the suite. Order: fixture fix -> standalone 21/21 green -> un-exclude -> full run_verify green (floor count in test_verify_manifest.mjs may need +1 — check). Do NOT edit hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs or any lib module. Mirrors via self-onboard + render as usual.

truths: test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs runs 21/21 green standalone AND inside run_verify (exclusion removed; discovery picks it up).
The fixture vendors the lib directory wholesale (no hand-maintained module list remains); throwingRegistry override still works (its row still passes).
hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs and .bee/bin/hooks twin remain byte-identical to HEAD (zero hook edits).
Full run_verify.mjs green (51 suites expected); manifest floor updated if required.
prohibitions: Do NOT modify the hook or lib modules.
Do NOT keep the suite excluded or weaken any of its 21 rows.

trace.outcome: Guard-hook suite fixture now vendors the whole lib dir (no stale hand-list); un-excluded and rejoined run_verify, 51/51 green.
trace.verify_output: PASS run_verify: 51 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=34086ms (exit 0). Standalone: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs -> 21 passed, 0 failed. test_store_lock.mjs failed once under concurrency (known WSL2 flake per contention-split learnings), rerun standalone -> PASS. test_render_race.mjs did not flake this run.
